metadata.description: Stargazer-specific skills: multi-perspective code review and adversarial claim verification

plugins.name: stargazer-review-gang
plugins.description: Multi-perspective code review with 8 grouped reviewer agents (Scala/ZIO/Architecture/FDB/Temporal/Tapir/Frontend/Testing), opus validator, and confidence scoring for the Stargazer codebase

plugins.name: stargazer-subagent-dev
plugins.description: Execute implementation plans for Stargazer via paired implementer+reviewer agents with direct communication

plugins.name: stargazer-batch-dev
plugins.description: Batch-parallel plan execution for Stargazer via advisor (opus) + implementers (sonnet) per batch, autonomous loop until all tasks done

plugins.name: prove
plugins.description: Adversarial verification skill: prover vs disprover agents argue, then a judge synthesizes a verdict
